title: Moving Delicate Traditional Instruments: Packing Kirars, Masenqos, and Begenas with Extreme Cushioning
excerpt: Pack kirar masenqo begena: delicate traditional instruments extreme cushioning, Ethiopian music instrument moving, shock and climate protection.
content:
Moving delicate traditional instruments: packing kirars, masenqos, and begenas with extreme cushioning

Kirar strings, masenqo horsehair, begena heavy strings and wooden box—each demands extreme cushioning and climate respect. Traditional instruments are not guitar in gig bag; they are cultural objects vibration-sensitive and repair artisan scarce.

This guide packs kirars, masenqos, and begenas with extreme cushioning.

Kirar packing

Loosen strings quarter turn; neck splint cardboard; body soft case then rigid box; bow separate bag; desiccant case not touching wood.

Masenqo packing

Hard case mandatory; hair bow cloth; vertical store; hand-carry if solo precious; heat avoid trunk afternoon.

Begena packing

Large frame custom foam cut; strings loosen; stand separate; two-person lift; mark FRAGILE MUSIC HEAVY.

Climate and shock

Mid-truck foam nest; no stack; acclimate case closed one hour destination; tune gradually post-move.

Insurance and custody

Photo; appraisal performance instruments; hand-carry tier irreplaceable.

Active Movers instruments tier

Foam materials; MUSIC load priority; climate cab recommendation disclosed.

Conclusion

Kirar masenqo begena arrive playable through extreme foam, loosened tension, vertical cases, climate care—traditional instruments packed like elders not cargo.
author: Active Movers Team
